claim: BruCON 0x12 CFP runs April 1 to April 30, 2026; conference talks/workshops Sept 24-25, 2026; trainings Sept 21-23 / 22-23.
quote: BruCON has opened the call for papers/training/workshops for BruCON 0x12... CFP opens April 1, deadline April 30. Conference workshops (24-25 September 2026), Conference talks (24-25 September 2026), 3-day training (21-23 September 2026), 2-day training (22-23 September).

claim: BruCON 0x12 CFP submission portal; deadline April 30, 2026 23:59 CEST; €1000 travel reimbursement and accommodation provided for accepted speakers.
quote: The submission period closes on April 30, 2026 at 11:59 PM (Romance Daylight Time, UTC+02:00). Travel expenses up to 1,000 EUR are reimbursed, accommodation is provided.

claim: OWASP AppSec Days France 2026 CFP closes May 7, 2026 23:59 CEST; conference Sept 24, 2026 in Paris; in-person only; lightning (20m) and full session (45m) formats; French/English.
quote: CFP Deadline: May 7, 2026 at 11:59 PM (Romance Daylight Time, UTC+02:00). Conference Date: September 24, 2026. Location: La Maison des Associations et de la Solidarité, 10 rue des Terres au Curé, 75013 Paris, France. Two talk formats: Lightning talks (20 minutes) and full sessions (45 minutes). In-person event only.

claim: OWASP AppSec Days France 2026 is the first local OWASP conference in Paris.
quote: OWASP AppSec Days France 2026 is the first local OWASP conference to be held in Paris, France.

claim: 24th escar Europe 2026 CFP submission deadline May 10, 2026; conference Nov 17-18, 2026 in Bonn or online; published Feb 2, 2026.
quote: Submission deadline: May 10, 2026. Call for Papers was published on February 2, 2026.

claim: escar Europe 2026 covers automotive cyber security; both Scientific Track and Presentation/Industry Track share the May 10, 2026 deadline.
quote: Submission deadline: May 10, 2026. This applies to both the Scientific Track and the Presentation and Industry Track submissions.

claim: escar Europe is described as the world's leading automotive cyber security conference, in its 24th edition for 2026.
quote: The 24th escar Europe will take place November 17 & 18, 2026 in Bonn, Germany or online... 24 years of automotive cyber security excellence.

claim: Pass the SALT 2026 (Lille, France) CFP closed March 31, 2026; conference June 30 - July 2, 2026.
quote: The Call For Papers opened on January 15, 2026, and closes on March 31, 2026, with notifications to speakers coming in late April 2026.

claim: Pass the SALT 2026 dedicated to Free Software and Security; held at Université Catholique de Lille, free, English-language.
quote: The 2026 edition of Pass the SALT will be held on June 30 to July 2, 2026, at Université Catholique de Lille... dedicated to Free Software and Security.

claim: OrangeCon 2026 (Amsterdam) CFP closed March 31, 2026 23:59 UTC; submissions no longer accepted.
quote: Submissions closed on 2026-03-31 23:59 (UTC). Proposals are closed.

claim: OrangeCon 2026 takes place 4 June 2026 at Meervaart Theatre, Amsterdam; non-profit, by/for the Dutch security community.
quote: Date: 4th of June 2026. Location: Meer en Vaart 300, 1068 LE Amsterdam at Meervaart Theatre.

claim: leHACK 2026 (Paris) CFP closed April 12, 2026; conference June 26-27, 2026.
quote: CFP Deadline: Sunday, April 12, 2026. Conference Dates: Friday, June 26 - Saturday, June 27, 2026. The CFP ended, bear with us as we're crunching down the list.

claim: Hardwear.io NL 2026 (Amsterdam) CFP closed March 5, 2026; conference Nov 16-20, 2026.
quote: CFP Opens: 8th Jan 2026 and CFP Closes: 5th Mar 2026. Hardwear.io NL is scheduled for 16th – 20th November 2026 at Amsterdam Marriott Hotel.

claim: ACM WiSec 2026 (Saarbrücken) second-cycle deadline March 3, 2026; conference June 30 - July 3, 2026.
quote: Location: Saarbrücken, Germany. Dates: June 30 to July 3, 2026. Second Cycle: March 3, 2026 (AOE)... no time for extensions this year.

claim: OffensiveCon Berlin 2026 CFP closed March 1, 2026.
quote: Submissions closed on March 1st, 2026, 18:00 (Europe/Berlin).

claim: TROOPERS26 (Heidelberg) CFP closed April 2, 2026; conference June 22-26, 2026.
quote: Call for Papers submissions closed on April 2, 2026. The TROOPERS26 conference will be held from June 22-26, 2026.

claim: BSides Frankfurt 2026 CFP deadline March 31, 2026; conference Sept 10, 2026.
quote: Event Date: September 10, 2026. CFP Deadline: 2026-03-31.

claim: heise devSec 2026 (Marburg) CFP closed April 14, 2026; conference Sept 21-23, 2026 at Congresszentrum Marburg.
quote: Call for Proposals for the heise devSec in Marburg runs until April 14. The event will take place on September 21-23, 2026 at the Congresszentrum Marburg.

claim: MCTTP 2026 (Munich) CFP deadline April 15, 2026 23:59 CEST.
quote: All proposals received before April 15th, 2026, 23:59 CEST will be taken into consideration by the programme committee.

claim: BSides Munich 2026 conference Nov 9, 2026 at The Westin Grand Munich; workshops Nov 7 at Hochschule München; CFP page lists 'CFP Opens Soon' as of late April 2026.
quote: Workshops: November 7, 2026 at Hochschule München. Conference: November 9, 2026 at The Westin Grand Munich. CFP Opens Soon.

claim: Elbsides 2026 (Hamburg) conference June 5, 2026 at Hotel Hafen Hamburg; ticket sales start April 20, 2026.
quote: The Elbsides Conference 2026 will be held on Friday, June 5th, 2026 in Hamburg, Germany at Hotel Hafen Hamburg. Ticket sales will start on Monday, April 20th, 2026.

claim: German OWASP Day 2026 (Karlsruhe) is Sept 23-24, 2026 at IHK Haus der Wirtschaft; CFP not yet open at time of writing.
quote: German OWASP Day 2026 will be held in Karlsruhe on September 23-24, 2026... at the IHK Haus der Wirtschaft, Lammstraße 13-17.

claim: ONE Conference 2026 (Netherlands) takes place 6-7 October 2026; CFP for sessions has closed.
quote: The ONE Conference is the Netherlands' prime international cybersecurity conference. The next year's edition will take place on 6 & 7 October 2026.

claim: DeepSec IDSC 2026 (Vienna, Austria — outside this list's scope) CFP open until July 31, 2026.
quote: Until July 31st 2026, 23:59 CEST, papers and lightning talk submissions will be accepted. DeepSec 2026 will be held on November 17–20, 2026.

claim: hack.lu 2026 (Luxembourg — outside this list's scope) CFP closes May 31, 2026; conference Oct 20-23, 2026.
quote: The deadline to submit proposals is May 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM (Luxembourg time). The convention will be held in October (20-23.10.2026).
